message:
fix: Add transitive module imports and stdlib re-exports

Two fixes for unit test improvements:

1. Transitive module imports (compile.zig):
   - When writing module to cache, also add @import statements for
     that module's own dependencies
   - Fixes test_nested_imports where test_math imports test_utils
     but generated test_math.zig was missing the import

2. Stdlib re-exports (runtime.zig):
   - Add re-exports for re, sys, time modules at top level
   - Enables runtime.re.match() instead of runtime.Lib.re.match()
   - Fixes codegen that generates runtime.re for stdlib imports

CPython tests: 5/5 (100%)
Unit tests: 16/30 (53.3%)
